---
title: "04_adding_external"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Scale Xreg
xreg_ext_train <- scale(train_data %>%
  select(daily_temp, daily_humidity))

xreg_ext_valid <- scale(valid_data %>%
  select(daily_temp, daily_humidity))
```

```{r}
for (K_week in 1:2) {
  for (K_year in 4:5) {

    fourier_train <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year))
    fourier_valid <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year), h = 31)

    # combine Fourier + external regressors
    xreg_train <- cbind(fourier_train, xreg_ext_train)
    xreg_valid <- cbind(fourier_valid, xreg_ext_valid)

    fit_try <- auto.arima(
      ts_train_msts,
      xreg = xreg_train,
      seasonal = FALSE,
      stepwise = TRUE,
      approximation = TRUE,
      lambda = "auto",
      biasadj = TRUE
    )

    fc_try <- forecast(fit_try, xreg = xreg_valid, h = 31)

    rmse_try <- rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_try$mean))

    if (rmse_try < best_dhr$rmse) {
      best_dhr$rmse <- rmse_try
      best_dhr$K_week <- K_week
      best_dhr$K_year <- K_year
      best_dhr$fit <- fit_try
      best_dhr$fc <- fc_try
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
xreg_ext_full <- full_train_data %>%
  select(daily_temp, daily_humidity) %>%
  as.matrix()
```


```{r}
final_xreg_train <- cbind(
  fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year)
  ),
  xreg_ext_full
)

final_xreg_future <- cbind(
  fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year),
    h = 31
  ),
  xreg_ext_full
)

final_fit <- auto.arima(
  ts_full_msts,
  xreg = final_xreg_train,
  seasonal = FALSE,
  stepwise = FALSE,
  approximation = FALSE,
  lambda = "auto",
  biasadj = TRUE
)

final_fc <- forecast(final_fit, xreg = final_xreg_future, h = 31)
```
